news.title: Meta’s Embrace of A.I. Is Making Its Employees Miserable
news.snippet: As it adapts to the artificial intelligence era, the company is pushing many of its 78,000 workers to use the technology, and preparing to lay some of them off.

news.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX Plans $55 Billion Investment to Make A.I. Chips
news.snippet: The rocket company’s new semiconductor factory, called Terafab, is part of the billionaire’s increasing efforts to dominate artificial intelligence.

news.title: Elon Musk’s Confidante Shivon Zilis Is Cast as His Inside Source at OpenAI
news.snippet: Shivon Zilis worked closely with Elon Musk while she was on OpenAI’s board. Her ties to the world’s richest man were detailed in a landmark trial on Wednesday.

news.title: Anthropic’s C.E.O. Says It Could Grow by 80 Times This Year
news.snippet: The chief executive, Dario Amodei, said the rapid growth had exponentially increased the start-up’s need for more computing power.

news.title: Elon Musk Wanted OpenAI to Go Commercial, Greg Brockman Testifies
news.snippet: Greg Brockman, OpenAI’s president, testified in a trial pitting Mr. Musk against his company that the world’s richest man was eager to change how it operated as a nonprofit.

news.title: Apple Reaches $250 Million Settlement Over Claims It Misled People on A.I.
news.snippet: Some iPhone owners will be eligible to receive $25 to $95 over claims that the tech giant oversold its artificial intelligence system, Apple Intelligence.

news.title: Coinbase Lays Off 14% of Employees as A.I. Changes Work
news.snippet: The largest U.S. crypto exchange said it was cutting jobs because of cryptocurrency market volatility and to “optimize” for the artificial intelligence era.

news.title: S.E.C. Settles Lawsuit Against Elon Musk Over His Twitter Disclosures
news.snippet: The agency, which has been pulling back on lawsuits against major companies, ended a case that had accused Mr. Musk of hiding his purchases of Twitter stock. He agreed to pay $1.5 million.

news.title: Elon Musk’s Lawyers Ask OpenAI’s President Why He Is Worth $30 Billion
news.snippet: The legal team implied in a federal trial that Greg Brockman, OpenAI’s president and co-founder, was driven by greed rather than building safe A.I.

news.title: TikTok scales back AI-generated video descriptions after absurd errors
news.snippet: While only rolled out to some users, the feature's bizarre AI-generated descriptions were shared widely.

news.title: Instagram privacy tech is turned off today - what does this mean for your DMs?
news.snippet: The platform said it would remove end-to-end encrypted messages, a major U‑turn by parent company Meta.

news.title: Meta brings High Court challenge over Ofcom fees
news.snippet: Meta said Ofcom's calculations were "disproportionate"; the regulator said it would defend its position.

news.title: Former OpenAI board member says Elon Musk offered her sperm donations
news.snippet: Shivon Zilis is the mother of four of Musk's children. That relationship began as she advised OpenAI.

news.title: Robot wars - what an operation in Ukraine tells us about the battlefield of the near future
news.snippet: After Ukraine's President Zelensky said territory had been captured using just robots and drones, what is the future of unmanned warfare?

news.title: 'I thought he was going to hit me,' OpenAI co-founder says of Musk
news.snippet: OpenAI president Greg Brockman spoke during the second week of a month-long trial between Elon Musk and OpenAI's Sam Altman.

news.title: Apple to pay up to $95 to some US iPhone buyers over AI lawsuit
news.snippet: Claims from last year said the tech firm’s advertising of Apple Intelligence fooled iPhone buyers.

news.title: US to safety test new AI models from Google, Microsoft, xAI
news.snippet: New agreements between the companies and the Commerce department build on Biden-era pacts.

news.title: Pornhub to become accessible again for some UK users
news.snippet: UK iPhone users who have completed Apple's device-based age checks will no longer be blocked from the site's adult content.

news.title: Oscars says AI actors and writing cannot win awards
news.snippet: The academy that controls the Oscars on Friday issued new award eligibility requirements around the use of artificial intelligence in film.

news.title: Tech Life
news.snippet: Workers train AI to identify everyday objects by labelling items in photos and videos.

news.title: Tesla’s Latest Recall? Wheels May Fall Off Cybertrucks
news.snippet: In what is the 11th Cybertruck recall, certain models of Elon Musk’s embattled pickup could experience a sudden, unexpected wheel separation, thanks to the wrong grease and loose nuts.

news.title: Nick Bostrom Has a Plan for Humanity’s ‘Big Retirement’
news.snippet: The philosopher thinks humans should pursue advanced AI and the promise of a “solved world.”

news.title: There’s a Long-Shot Proposal to Protect California Workers From AI
news.snippet: California gubernatorial candidate Tom Steyer is proposing a new jobs guarantee for workers displaced by artificial intelligence.

news.title: The New Wild West of AI Kids’ Toys
news.snippet: These cuddly, connected companions could disrupt everything from make-believe to bedtime stories. No wonder some lawmakers want them banned.

news.title: The Best Cat Water Fountains of 2026: Petlibro, Petkit, Oneisall
news.snippet: Ensuring your cat stays hydrated is one of the best ways to keep your pet healthy. The right pet water fountain can help.

news.title: Meet Rassvet, Russia’s Answer to Starlink
news.snippet: With the launch of the first 16 satellites, Russia begins construction of a network for satellite internet that aims to cover the entire country by 2030. But getting there won’t be easy.

news.title: Musk v. Altman Evidence Shows What Microsoft Executives Thought of OpenAI
news.snippet: Leaders at the tech giant were skeptical of OpenAI—but wary of pushing it into the arms of Amazon, according to emails dating back to 2018.

news.title: Laid-off Oracle workers tried to negotiate better severance. Oracle said no.
news.snippet: Some found out they didn't qualify for WARN Act protections like two-months notice because the company had classified them as remote workers.

news.title: Prime Video follows Netflix and Disney by adding a TikTok-like ‘Clips’ feed in its app
news.snippet: The Clips feed aims to enable discovery by offering users a scrollable feed with short snippets of shows and movies.

news.title: Cloudflare says AI made 1,100 jobs obsolete, even as revenue hit a record high
news.snippet: Cloudflare announced its first large-scale layoff. CEO Matthew Prince says because of AI efficiency gains, the company doesn't need as many support roles.

news.title: Porsche shutters e-bike, battery, software subsidiaries as part of company overhaul
news.snippet: More than 500 people will be affected by the closures. “We must refocus on our core business,” Porsche CEO and executive chair Michael Leiters said in a statement. "This is the indispensable foundatio

news.title: Mother Ventures is looking at moms as the ‘economic engine’
news.snippet: The VC firm, which focuses on mothers as consumers, raised a $10 million debut fund.

news.title: Poland says hackers breached water treatment plants, and the US is facing the same threat
news.snippet: A report by Poland’s top intelligence agency accused Russia of sabotage and hacking activities against the country’s military and civilian infrastructure.

news.title: Pentagon releases UFO files on new website

news.title: 火山引擎携手中国移动，首创机密模型服务新模式

news.title: 百度搭子DuMate登顶PinchBench，超越Anthropic拿下全球龙虾执行争霸赛冠军
news.snippet: 5月8日凌晨，百度搭子DuMate登顶智能体评测基准PinchBench榜首，并在前5位中占据3席，超越Anthropic和OpenAI拿下全球龙虾执行争霸赛冠军。在另外一项DeepResearch深度研究榜单中，DuMate同样位列第一。PinchBench是OpenClaw赛道最能体现Agent真实工作能力的评测基准，重点考察Agent在23个真实工作场景下147个任务的多

news.title: 中国移动与火山引擎推出机密模型服务，为企业提供安全可信AI服务

news.title: 当AI开始懂情绪，AI奇妙物语点亮全民创意风潮
news.snippet: 2026年社交网络的“活人感”，一定是AI给的。从朋友圈的“赛博旅行照”到聊天框里的“AI扩图”，生成式AI已不再是极客的玩具，而是普通人记录生活、表达情绪的第六感。当技术门槛被踏平，一场关于“谁更会玩”的创意竞赛悄然开启。近日，由「AI奇妙物语」与安慕希联合发起的“即梦X安慕希整颗蓝莓AI创作大赛” 正在社交平台卷起一场创意风暴。这场事关想象力的全民狂欢折射出的是“AI奇妙物

news.title: 研发投入同比增长25.44%，奇瑞以科技创新推动高质量发展
news.snippet: 2026年4月，奇瑞集团销量再创新高：单月总销量25.14万辆，同比增长25.2%，稳居中国品牌销量第二；新能源销量10.03万辆，同比增长63.8%，规模与增速均居行业前列；出口17.76万辆，同比增长102.4%，再创中国汽车单月出口新纪录。

news.title: 我所知道的胡峥楠
news.snippet: 2024年的初夏，小米SU7的爆单与偶发的几起事故，将这家初出茅庐的造车新势力拉入了冰火两重天的舆论场。在新技术的冲击面前，有人感叹诺基亚式的倾覆就在眼前，但真正的局内人眼里，却浮现出另一番光景。当一些狂热的粉丝在社交网络上对着传统车企疯狂输出时，雷军却在牌桌底下，做着最务实、甚至是最传统的算计。这个算计的核心，叫胡峥楠。2026年4月，胡峥楠成为小

news.title: 中国高校科研 AI 云市场，阿里云第一！
news.snippet: 5 月 6 日，国际市场调研机构沙利文（Frost & Sullivan）发布《中国高校科研机构AI4S市场追踪报告，2025年》。报告显示，阿里云以26%的市场份额领跑中国高校科研机构AI4S云市场，稳居第一。

news.title: OpenAI 将补齐 Codex 跨端连接拼图，安卓版 ChatGPT 酝酿远程接管功能
news.snippet: IT之家 5 月 9 日消息，科技媒体 Android Authority 昨日（5 月 8 日）发布博文，通过挖掘安卓 1.2026.125 版 ChatGPT 之后，发现 OpenAI 正为 Codex 酝酿远程控制能力。根据代码描述，用户未来先在桌面打开 Codex，并登录同一 ChatGPT 账号，然后再用手机连接、恢复或重连远程会话。

news.snippet: OpenAI发布三款实时音频模型，开启AI智能体实时交互新范式。Anthropic估值突破1.2万亿美元反超OpenAI，Claude 3技术优势重塑AI行业竞争格局。谷歌试点AI辅助工程师面试流程，允许候选人使用Gemini模型，反映AI时代工作流变革。亚马逊AWS北弗吉尼亚数据中心因过热引发服务中断，暴露云基础设施脆弱性。
